sections.instruction: Complete the information below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER.
Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: What’s the new improvement about the zoo this time?
options: A The zoo has built a new dog-walking area.
B The zoo has brought a new batch of animals
C The zoo has expanded its exhibition area.

questions.content: What is the change for the new regulation enacted in June?
options: A The zoo is not open during the weekdays.
B Visitors are allowed to feed the animals at night
C Visitors are allowed to see the animals until the late night.

questions.content: While visiting the kangaroo, which behaviour is forbidden?
Why is the pye-dog zone temporarily closed?
options: A Because the fence is broken.
B Because the pye-dogs are in hibernation
C Because the pye-dog zone is under construction.

questions.content: Where can the visitors buy the discounted ticket?

sections.instruction: Label the map below. Write the correct letter A-H next to questions 16-20.
Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: The course has improved the environment since
options: A it was regulated by law.
C more species were brought from other places.

questions.content: What is the biggest reason why the organisation improved greatly?
options: A It was funded by a private investor
B It sold out its shares.
C It got the governmental fund in the first year.

questions.content: What is suggested from the reports?
options: B Teachers and the students have benefitted from the field trips.
C The environment has been terribly damaged.

questions.content: Who did obtain the special experience from the field trip carried out by the organisation?
What TWO problems does the report focus on?
Which TWO benefits of this activity to the students are mentioned by the professor?
options: D they learn how to collect data
E they know the importance of environment protection

questions.content: What TWO things will the woman do in the rest of the time when no activities are going on?
options: D participate in one of fun hobbies
